column3: HSTS not set — handled by Cloudflare at TLS termination, not nginx
CSP style-src unsafe-inline required by Angular; form-action and base-uri are explicitly set
Modern Web Application — informational only, not a vulnerability
Cache-control directives — informational only, not a vulnerability
Storable and Cacheable Content — informational only, not a vulnerability
Timestamp Disclosure — build timestamps in JS bundles, not sensitive data
Dangerous JS Functions — setTimeout/setInterval/Function used internally by Angular and Zone.js, not application code
Retrieved from Cache — Cloudflare CDN caching behavior, not a vulnerability
COEP set to unsafe-none intentionally — require-corp breaks the Workbox service worker's importScripts() loading and would block GitHub avatar/Pages embeds lacking CORP headers
